title: Payment to Tracking Stabilization
summary: Stabilized the emergency payment-to-tracking handoff, ETA rehydration, demo provider seeding, and rating modal behavior for staging.

changes.message: Preserved canonical request identity and ETA state across payment approval, realtime updates, hydration, and Contact Dispatch.
Prevented duplicate rating modal flashes by resolving recovered and in-flow rating through a single modal surface.
Hardened demo hospital bootstrap against duplicate location conflicts and non-hospital provider seeds.
Documented the verified no-reload cash approval tracking flow and remaining data cleanup notes.
